channel.title: Linux on A Portuguese Actuary
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on A Portuguese Actuary

item.title: Goodbye Windows ... Hello Linux
item.description: After several (failed) attempts of adopting Linux as my main Operating System, I finally found a friendly enough Linux distro for a long time Microsoft user. It is Puppy Linux (http://www.puppylinux.org) and is currently on release 4.20. Download the CD image from the URL below. http://distro.ibiblio.org/pub/linux/distributions/puppylinux/puppy-4.2-k2.6.25.16-seamonkey.iso My adventures with this OS will definitely produce interesting writing material.
